1839670.name: Stop The Cult
1839670.description:
STOP THE CULT, A NARRATIVE-DRIVEN GAME
After the sudden death of their last bookkeeper, you are now responsible for the supply chain of a group of adventurers.
Assist them in stopping the cult that strives to awaken a lost one.



FEATURES
  • Accounting
    Using your team log, find the veracity of the Invoices you receive. Choose to fulfill the will from your fallen teammates (or sell them to further fuel your chances of success).

  • Manage Items
    After purchasing what is necessary, ensure your team triumph by delivering the required items.

  • Poison
    Deduce what monster killed your teammate and create a powerful concoction to exact revenge.
1839670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
